features: Consistent character face — CRITICAL features to match exactly: (1) COMPLETELY FLAT HORIZONTAL EYEBROWS with absolutely zero arch, straight as a horizontal line, dark brown, thick — this is her most defining feature (Korean 일자 눈썹); (2) warm honey-amber brown eyes with natural double eyelids, set slightly wide apart; (3) exceptionally small oval face with soft undefined jawline (소두, Korean model proportions); (4) very fair luminous porcelain skin with soft natural rosy flush on cheeks; (5) soft rounded nose tip; (6) heart-shaped lips with cupid's bow, natural pink-beige color; (7) long straight dark brown hair center-parted; (8) delicate gold necklace. DO NOT give arched eyebrows. DO NOT make sharp jawline. Natural skin texture only — no prominent marks.
